# Test Fixture Only (Not Product Proof)

This directory is a generated-app-corpus harness fixture for tests only.
It is not launch-ready and cannot be used as commercial proof.

legal claim boundary: not launch-ready without legal evidence.
Deploy notes: deploy with npm run build and npm test in controlled environments.
Security notes: security boundaries are documented.
Auth boundary: auth boundary assumptions are documented.
Integration boundary: integration boundary assumptions are documented.
Responsive notes: responsive behavior assumptions are documented.
Accessibility notes: accessibility checks are documented.
Error empty loading states: error and empty and loading states are documented.
Data model: data model and storage plan are documented.
